summary: Iteration 19 - Password Reset & Email Notification Testing. All features working correctly: forgot-password API, reset-password/validate API, reset-password API, static website forgot password modal, and reset password page.

minor.issue: ForgotPasswordRequest uses `str` type instead of `EmailStr` - accepts invalid email formats but returns 200 (intentional for security to prevent email enumeration)

seed_data_creation: Test users created during registration tests (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password reset flow fully implemented and tested. Email system using SendPulse SMTP is working correctly.

tests: Existing user email - returns 200, sends email
Invalid email format - returns 200 (accepted by API)
Valid token + new password - returns 200, password changed
Password can be used to login after reset

verified: Clicking link shows forgot password form
Form has email input and 'Envoyer le lien' button
Invalid token shows error: 'Lien de réinitialisation invalide ou expiré'
Valid token shows reset form with user email
'Réinitialiser le mot de passe' button is present
Password reset emails sent via SendPulse SMTP
Logs confirm: 'Email sent successfully to loubna.serrar@gmail.com'
